text_block_list.name: Monologue
text_block_list.text:
With all of Symboli Rudolf's races over, now is as
good a time as any to reflect on her
achievements.

text_block_list.name: Symboli Rudolf
text_block_list.text:
Judging purely by number of accolades, my
record is not as incontestable as I might have
hoped.
choice_data_list: But everyone still knows you're the Emperor.

text_block_list.name: Symboli Rudolf
text_block_list.text: That's... kind of you to say.

text_block_list.name: Symboli Rudolf
text_block_list.text:
If I have achieved that much, I can call my
imperial campaign a success.

text_block_list.name: Symboli Rudolf
text_block_list.text:
These victories will fuel me to pursue even
greater feats.

text_block_list.name: Symboli Rudolf
text_block_list.text: As did you, Trainer. Thank you.
